scripts.build: node scripts/prepare-presentation-assets.mjs && npm run build:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-ui-dist.mjs
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node ../tools/server-safe-string-scan.mjs && TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true node --loader ts-node/esm scripts/contract-smoke.mjs && TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true node --loader ts-node/esm --test src/core/orchestrator.test.ts src/core/orchestrator.transitions.test.ts src/core/state.test.ts src/core/glossary.test.ts src/core/llm_timeout.test.ts src/core/model_routing.test.ts src/core/session_token_log.test.ts src/core/turn_policy_renderer.test.ts src/contracts/contract_inventory_snapshot.test.ts src/handlers/golden_trace_contract.test.ts src/handlers/step_contracts.test.ts src/handlers/run_step.test.ts src/handlers/run_step_finals.test.ts src/steps/offtopic_schema_contract.test.ts src/steps/dream_explainer.test.ts src/steps/strategy_instructions.test.ts src/steps/rulesofthegame_instructions.test.ts src/steps/rulesofthegame_contract.test.ts src/steps/instructions_contract_sweep.test.ts src/server_safe_string.test.ts src/mcp_app_contract.test.ts src/ui_sanitize.test.ts src/ui_render.test.ts
scripts.test:security:compliance: TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true node --loader ts-node/esm --test src/handlers/ingress.test.ts src/core/session_token_log.test.ts src/middleware/security.test.ts src/middleware/rateLimit.test.ts src/server/mcp_registration.test.ts src/server/run_step_transport.security.test.ts src/server/run_step_transport_idempotency.test.ts
scripts.arch:run-step:check: npm run arch:run-step:loc && npm run arch:run-step:boundary && npm run arch:run-step:complexity
scripts.arch:run-step-runtime:check: npm run arch:run-step-runtime:loc && npm run arch:run-step-runtime:boundary && npm run arch:run-step-runtime:complexity
